ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "CustomerId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "CreditScore" INTEGER /* Customer's credit score */,
  "Geography" TEXT /* Customer's geographical location (e.g., France, Spain) */,
  "Gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "Age" INTEGER /* Customer's age */,
  "Tenure" INTEGER /* Customer's tenure with the bank */,
  "EstimatedSalary" REAL /* Customer's estimated salary */,
  "Exited" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has exited the bank */,
  "CreatedDate" TEXT /* Date the customer record was created */,
  "UpdatedDate" TEXT /* Date the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("CustomerId")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "AccountId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "CustomerId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer who owns the account */,
  "AccountType" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings, Credit Card) */,
  "Balance" REAL /* Current account balance */,
  "AccountStatus" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Closed) */,
  "OpenedDate" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "ClosedDate" TEXT /* Date the account was closed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("AccountId")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "TransactionId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "AccountId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the account associated with the transaction */,
  "TransactionDate" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "TransactionType" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Debit, Credit, Transfer) */,
  "Amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "Description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("TransactionId")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "ProductId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "ProductName" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "ProductType" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Credit Card, Loan, Investment) */,
  "Description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ProductId")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "CustomerId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer */,
  "ProductId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product */,
  "StartDate" TEXT /* Date the customer started using the product */,
  "EndDate" TEXT /* Date the customer stopped using the product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("CustomerId", "ProductId")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "EmployeeId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "Name" TEXT /* Employee's name */,
  "Email" TEXT /* Employee's email */,
  "Role" TEXT /* Employee's role (e.g., Sales, Marketing, Customer Support) */,
  "Department" TEXT /* Employee's department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("EmployeeId")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_customers" (
  "EmployeeId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the employee */,
  "CustomerId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer */,
  "StartDate" TEXT /* Date the employee started managing the customer */,
  "EndDate" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped managing the customer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("EmployeeId", "CustomerId")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "LogId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "CustomerId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer (if applicable) */,
  "AccountId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the account (if applicable) */,
  "EmployeeId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the employee who made the update */,
  "LogDate" TEXT /* Date the update occurred */,
  "LogType" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "LogDescription" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("LogId")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "ReportId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "ReportName" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "ReportType" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Customer Satisfaction, Account Balance, Transaction Frequency) */,
  "ReportDate" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "ReportData" TEXT /* Serialized data for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ReportId")
)
